27476.title: Antiques Roadshow
27476.description: Fiona Bruce and the experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in north Wales, the home of the Yorke family. Treasures turning up include a mourning ring connected to Charlotte Bronte and a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations.

27477.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27477.description: Frank and Lu have a mystery to solve when a man with no recollection of who he is or where he came from wanders into their lives.

27478.title: Our Girl
27478.description: With the training exercise now having become a fully-fledged rescue mission, Georgie and James are compelled to use every ounce of cunning and training to evade capture while they wait to be rescued. As Bones and his Special Forces unit lead the effort to rescue them without attracting unwanted attention, Georgie and James, helped by local teenager Ezra, must overcome seemingly insurmountable odds.

27479.title: Father Brown
27479.description: Father Brown must intervene when it appears that a dark spirit has murderous intent.

27480.title: Antiques Roadshow
27480.description: Fiona Bruce and the experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in north Wales, the home of the Yorke family. Treasures turning up include a mourning ring connected to Charlotte Bronte and a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations.

27481.title: Impossible
27481.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

27482.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27482.description: Frank and Lu race against the clock when an undertaker is given only 24 hours to live by two mysterious hitmen.

27483.title: Bargain Hunt
27483.description: Anita Manning presents from the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire, with experts Christina Trevanion and Nick Hall. A team of best friends take on a married couple to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction.

27484.title: Bad Move
27484.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

27485.title: Keeping Up Appearances
27485.description: Super snob Hyacinth suddenly has a lot on her hands - attending the Mayor's fancy dress ball and getting to know an important new neighbour.

27486.title: Doctors
27486.description: Valerie sees omens everywhere, and Bear can't see what's in front of him. Zara has to step in when a one-night stand has disastrous consequences.

27487.title: EastEnders
27487.description: Callum can't open up to Ben, Kat comes up with a business idea, and Vi meddles in the Highway marriage.

27488.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27488.description: Frank and Lu race against the clock when an undertaker is given only 24 hours to live by two mysterious hitmen.

27489.title: Bargain Hunt
27489.description: Anita Manning presents from the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire, with experts Christina Trevanion and Nick Hall. A team of best friends take on a married couple to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction.

27490.title: Impossible
27490.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

27491.title: Bargain Hunt
27491.description: Charlie Ross presents from the Lincolnshire Antiques and Home show. Helping out the teams are experts Raj Bisram and Kate Bliss. Meanwhile, Charlie hears about a devastating extreme weather event that destroyed Louth in 1920.

27492.title: Bad Move
27492.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

27493.title: Keeping Up Appearances
27493.description: Super snob Hyacinth suddenly has a lot on her hands - attending the Mayor's fancy dress ball and getting to know an important new neighbour.

27494.title: Bargain Hunt
27494.description: Natasha Raskin presents from the market town of Newark in Nottinghamshire with experts Kate Bliss and Gary Pe. Two mother-and-daughter teams battle it out, each buying three items to hopefully make a profit at auction.

27495.title: Doctors
27495.description: Valerie sees omens everywhere, and Bear can't see what's in front of him. Zara has to step in when a one-night stand has disastrous consequences.

27496.title: EastEnders
27496.description: Callum can't open up to Ben, Kat comes up with a business idea, and Vi meddles in the Highway marriage.

27497.title: Impossible
27497.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

27498.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27498.description: Frank and Lu investigate mysterious goings-on when a woman dies in a magic trick gone gruesomely wrong.

27499.title: Bargain Hunt
27499.description: Charlie Ross presents from the Lincolnshire Antiques and Home show. Helping out the teams are experts Raj Bisram and Kate Bliss. Meanwhile, Charlie hears about a devastating extreme weather event that destroyed Louth in 1920.

27500.title: Bad Move
27500.description: Nicky and Steve are missing the city, and fantasise about all the exciting things they could be doing before both experience a bizarre and unusual day.

27501.title: Keeping Up Appearances
27501.description: Richard forgets his wedding anniversary but then tells Hyacinth that he had a new alarm installed as an anniversary present, only he has forgotten the code.

27502.title: Doctors
27502.description: Valerie sees omens everywhere, and Bear can't see what's in front of him. Zara has to step in when a one-night stand has disastrous consequences.

27504.title: Impossible
27504.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

27505.title: Antiques Roadshow
27505.description: Fiona Bruce and the experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in north Wales, the home of the Yorke family. Treasures turning up include a mourning ring connected to Charlotte Bronte and a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations.

27506.title: Doctors
27506.description: A dog's death leads Rob to uncover a dark secret. Meanwhile, flirting is in the air, Daniel is flattered, but Bear is horrified.

27507.title: EastEnders
27507.description: Lola is worried when Isaac tells a lie, Callum confides in the wrong person, Bernie starts to feel the pressure, and Linda knows that the truth will soon be out.

27508.title: Mary Berry Cooks
27508.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

27509.title: Call the Midwife
27509.description: Valerie tries to help a struggling mother to accept her son's birth defect, and the Turners oversee a measles vaccination trial at the clinic. Meanwhile, Nurse Crane is determined to make the most of the Whitsun bank holiday.

27510.title: Summer of Rockets
27510.description: During the tumultuous summer of 1958, Samuel prepares to launch his new invention, which is attracting some suspicious followers, before meeting the mysterious Kathleen.

27511.title: Father Brown
27511.description: Suspicions abound when, in a shocking turn of events, the holiest house in Kembleford is linked to the death of a woman.
